document_meta.title: GHOS V2 Product Launch Plan — CardioQueue

art_direction.design_rationale: Authority-driven minimal palette with split-complementary accent. Clean corporate aesthetic for a healthcare system launch plan. Trustworthy, professional, modern.

components.markdown_content:
## Phased Rollout Strategy

**GHOS V2** is a complete clinic management system with queue management, patient PWA, reporting, inventory, and analytics.

We launch with **1–2 core departments** (Echo/ECG) in full production, while all other departments display as *Coming Soon — Under Construction*. This enables live testing at small scale — **10–12 patients/day** — with real-time feedback for rapid iteration.

As each department stabilizes, we activate the next — one at a time — ensuring quality at every step.

steps.title: Phase 1 — Week 1
steps.description: Deploy Echo/ECG department live. Register 10+ patients daily. Monitor all transitions.

steps.title: Phase 2 — Week 2+
steps.description: Activate General Medicine. Expand patient volume gradually.

steps.title: Phase 4 — Month 3+
steps.description: Full hospital-wide rollout with all departments and modules live.

components.markdown_content:
## Departments Launch Timeline

| Department | Phase | Status |
|-----------|-------|--------|
| Cardiology (Echo/ECG) | Phase 1 — Week 1 | 🟢 Active |
| General Medicine | Phase 1 — Week 2 | 🟡 Under Construction |
| Orthopedics | Phase 2 — Month 2 | 🔴 Coming Soon |
| Pediatrics | Phase 2 — Month 2 | 🔴 Coming Soon |
| Ophthalmology | Phase 3 — Month 3 | 📅 Planned |
| Dermatology | Phase 3 — Month 3 | 📅 Planned |
| All Others | Phase 4 — Month 4+ | 📅 TBD |

## Key Features Ready at Launch

- **Queue Management** — Real-time token system with call/start/complete/deliver workflow
- **Patient PWA** — Status tracking, token slip, reports view, timeline, feedback
- **Multi-role Dashboards** — Reception, Technician, Doctor, Manager views
- **Reports & Analytics** — Dashboard with live KPIs and trends
- **Patient Registration** — Visit management, bulk CSV import
- **Notes & Report Workflow** — Clinical notes with full status lifecycle

## Live Testing Protocol

| Step | Action |
|------|--------|
| 1 | Start with 10–12 patients/day in Echo/ECG only |
| 2 | Monitor all 6 status transitions: WAITING → DELIVERED |
| 3 | Track errors, bottlenecks, UX issues daily |
| 4 | Fix & deploy before adding next department |

## Risk Mitigation

- **Phased rollout** limits blast radius — issues stay contained to active departments only
- **Under Construction** banners prevent confusion for unavailable features
- **Small patient volume** (10–12/day) allows controlled, safe testing
- **Daily monitoring** with immediate hotfix capability

## Next Steps

| Timeline | Action |
|----------|--------|
| **Week 1** | Deploy Echo/ECG live, register 10+ patients |
| **Week 2** | Activate General Medicine department |
| **Month 2** | Orthopedics & Pediatrics go live |
| **Ongoing** | Bug fixes, performance tuning, feature additions |
